section.div: Open source Loom alternative. Beautiful, shareable screen recordings.

A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust
— remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.
Simple, extremely lightweight, extensible, configuration management library for Go. Supports JSON, TOML, YAML, env, command line, file, S3 etc. Alternative to viper.
